Ashley's Cancun BacheloretteGetaway

July 16 – July 20, 2026

Bride Squad, the countdown is on!

This guide has everything you need in one place: resort details, airport transfers, excursions, dinner tips, packing reminders, and who to contact if you need help.

Get ready for sunshine, laughter, memories, and an amazing celebration in paradise. 💗

Your Elite Travel Digital Guide

Welcome to Ashley's Cancun Bachelorette Getaway

Hotel: Riu Cancun
Address: Blvd Kukulkan Lote 5 A, Cancun, Quintana Roo 77500, Mexico
Dates: July 16–20, 2026
Booking Number: 4673930

Rooms: Junior Suite Ocean View All Inclusive for 7 adults in 5 rooms.

Important: I will also be away hosting another group trip during your travel dates, so texting is the quickest way to reach me. I will respond as soon as I am available.

Before You Go

Travel Reminders
  • Check in for your flight 24 hours before departure.
  • Arrive at the airport at least 3 hours before international travel.
  • Bring a valid passport. Passport cards are not valid for air travel to Mexico.
  • Have your booking number handy: 4673930.
  • Download the NexusTours app or register online before travel.
  • Download the RIU app and book dinner reservations at least one day before arrival if the group wants to dine together.
  • Riu Cancun may collect an environmental tax at check-in, approximately $5 USD per room, per night.
Register for Nexus Xperiences Hub Download NexusTours App

Arrival + Transfers

Look for Nexus Tours
  1. Go through Immigration and Customs.
  2. Collect your bags.
  3. Do not stop for timeshare or transportation solicitors.
  4. Exit the terminal building.
  5. Look for Nexus Tours representatives wearing orange shirts.
  6. They will direct you to your transportation to RIU Cancun.

Nexus Emergency: 998-283-1910 local, 1-800-070-0033 in Mexico, or 1-855-706-3987 from a U.S. phone.

Separate Flight Times

Two ladies have separate flight times. Audria and Eliana have a separate arrival transfer connected to their flight details.

Departure: Transfers are arranged for the group based on the travel documents. Confirm your individual pickup time through Nexus 48 hours before departure.

Weekend Itinerary

Thursday, July 16 • Arrival Day
Welcome to Cancun
Arrival + Resort Check-In

Arrive in Cancun, clear customs, collect luggage, find your Nexus Tours transfer, and head to Riu Cancun.

Check in, unpack, explore the resort, grab food or drinks, and settle into vacation mode.

Dinner recommendation: 7:30 PM at La Toscana or Miramar. Please book in the RIU app in advance if the group wants to dine together.

Photo idea: Cancun sign photo, first resort selfie, and bride squad arrival picture.

Friday, July 17 • ATV, Zipline + Cenote Day
Adventure Day
Booking Ref: 1404160607

Tour Start Time: 1:30 PM
Provider: Top Travel Connection
Pickup: Hotel Riu Cancun. Exact pickup time will be sent by the provider via email or text.

Includes: Roundtrip transportation, ATV road, zipline circuit, cenote swim, tequila tasting, cultural walk, bottled water, snack lunch of 2 tacos, and ATV insurance.

Bring: booking reservation, photo ID, swimsuit, towel, water shoes or sneakers, sunscreen, and cash.

Important: ATV drivers must be 18+. Weight limits are 300 lbs for ATVs and 270 lbs for ziplines. Locker rental is $5 USD plus $5 refundable deposit.

Dinner recommendation: 7:30 PM at Kawachi or Miramar after the excursion. Please book in the RIU app in advance.

Photo idea: ATV action shots, muddy after-photo, cenote group photo, and bride squad adventure selfies.

Excursion Ticket
Saturday, July 18 • Pool + Bride Squad Day
Pool • Beach • Bride Squad
Free Day

Enjoy the resort, pool, beach, cocktails, photos, and time together celebrating Ashley.

Ideas: brunch/breakfast, pool day, beach photos, spa time, and resort nightlife.

Dinner recommendation: 7:30 PM at Turquesa for a bride squad steakhouse dinner. Please book in the RIU app in advance.

Photo idea: Poolside bride squad photo, beach glam, matching tumblers, and sunset dinner looks.

Sunday, July 19 • Isla Mujeres Catamaran
Catamaran • Open Bar • Isla Mujeres
Booking Ref: 1405903209

Tour Start Time: 12:30 PM
Tour: Isla Mujeres Catamaran, Open Bar & Buffet Experience
Pickup: Roundtrip transportation from RIU Cancun. Exact pickup time will be provided the day before.

Includes: Catamaran cruise to Isla Mujeres, snorkeling equipment when weather permits, open bar with national beverages, buffet lunch, Beach Club access, and traveler’s insurance.

Bring: swimsuit, towel, sunscreen, sunglasses, spending money, and gratuities.

Required: $20 USD dock tax per person, paid at the marina. Snorkeling is weather dependent.

Dinner recommendation: 7:30 PM at Kulinarium for the final dinner. Please book in the RIU app in advance.

Photo idea: Catamaran net photo, ocean group shot, Isla Mujeres moments, and final dinner photos.

Excursion Ticket
Monday, July 20 • Departure Day
Safe Travels Home
Travel Home

Check out, gather luggage, confirm your Nexus transfer pickup time, and head to Cancun airport.

Note: Return transfer details will be available 48 hours before departure in the NexusTours app or through the communication method selected in Xperiences Hub.

Photo idea: One last lobby selfie before heading home.

Excursion Tickets

Keep These Handy

Use these mobile tickets for your Friday and Sunday excursions. Save a screenshot in case service is slow.

Resort at a Glance

Riu Cancun

Address: Blvd Kukulkan Lote 5 A, Cancun, Quintana Roo 77500, Mexico

Check-in: Most hotels begin check-in around 3:00 PM. Check-out: Most hotels are around 11:00 AM.

If your room is not ready upon arrival, the hotel can usually store your luggage.

Open Resort Map

Dining at RIU Cancun

Dinner Recommendations

No dinner reservations have been made for the group, so you can decide where to eat based on the vibe each night.

Elite Travel Tip: Download the RIU app before you arrive and book dinner reservations at least one day in advance so the group has the best chance of sitting together. Specialty restaurants can fill up quickly.
  • Thursday at 7:30 PM: La Toscana or Miramar
  • Friday at 7:30 PM: Kawachi or Miramar
  • Saturday at 7:30 PM: Turquesa
  • Sunday at 7:30 PM: Kulinarium
RIU Cancun Dining

Pepe's Food

Buffet | Grill | Lunch/Snacks

Quick bites, snacks, taco area, and terrace atmosphere.

RIU Cancun Dining

Turquesa

Steakhouse | À la carte | Dinner

Recommended for Saturday bride squad dinner.

RIU Cancun Dining

Kulinarium

Gourmet | À la carte | Dinner

Recommended for Sunday final dinner.

RIU Cancun Dining

Asian | Buffet | Dinner

Recommended for Friday after the excursion.

RIU Cancun Dining

Main | Buffet | Breakfast | Snack | Dinner

RIU Cancun Dining

Italian | Buffet | Dinner

Picture Ideas

Don’t Miss These Photo Moments

Bride squad poolside

Bride with each guest

Bars + Nightlife

Resort Bars

Enjoy drinks at Wet’n Drinking bar, Corner terrace bar, La Punta lobby bar, La Fiesta lounge bar, and the 24-hour Sports Bar.

Use the RIU app or resort activity board for daily shows, entertainment, and nightlife options.

Before You Head Out Tonight
  • Bring your room key.
  • Bring a little cash for tips.
  • Stay together and check in with the group.
  • Drink water between cocktails.
  • Text the group if you are leaving the resort.
  • Celebrate Ashley and have fun!
